title: salix depressa f. cinerascens
intro: Salix depressa f. cinerascens, also known as willow herb or European willowherb, is a perennial plant that belongs to the evening primrose family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its salicin content. Consuming Salix depressa f. cinerascens is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the management of colds and fever. Herbal preparations of Salix depressa f. cinerascens are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, although the plant can also be used in tincture form.
